hero.title: Brands That Stick. Websites That Sell.
hero.subtitle: I design logos, brand identities and websites for businesses that want to look and perform exceptional — without compromising on code quality or communication.

problem.title: Most websites look the same — and sell nothing.
problem.text: Off-the-shelf templates, random branding, and websites built “quickly” cost you more than you think: client trust, brand recognition, and sales. MXM Design changes that — from the first sketch to launch.
problem.feature1Text: No templates. Every project is built from scratch, tailored to your brand and audience.
problem.feature2Text: Design isn't just aesthetics — it's conversion. Every page is built with your business goals in mind.
problem.feature3Text: Fast, responsive, solidly-built websites that just work — no surprises.

why.title: A Partnership Built on Clear Rules
why.text: Handing your project to someone else takes trust. That's why I keep communication clear at every step — and I don't disappear after launch.
why.check1: Clear communication at every stage of the project
why.check2: Support and rollout help after the site goes live
why.check3: A free graphics package included with every website
why.check4: Unique design tailored to your brand
why.check5: Code written with quality and speed in mind

testimonial.quote: The website MXM Design built completely changed how clients perceive our brand. The process was clear, fast, and free of surprises — exactly what we needed.
testimonial.author: MXM Design Client

packages.title: Choose the Package That Fits Your Project
packages.subtitle: Every project is different — final pricing is always tailored individually.
packages.brandingDesc: A complete visual identity for your brand.
packages.webDesc: A responsive website designed to convert.
packages.webItem1: UI/UX design tailored to your brand
packages.adsDesc: Ad creatives and graphics that capture attention.
packages.adsItem1: Meta Ads and Google Ads creatives

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What does the process look like?
faq.a1: We start with a short conversation about your goals and brand, then I prepare a quote and timeline. Once approved, we move to design, feedback rounds, and launch.
faq.q2: How long does a website take to build?
faq.a2: Depending on scope, a standard website typically takes 2–4 weeks from design approval.
faq.a3: Every project includes a set number of revision rounds during the design phase, so you're confident the final result meets your expectations.
faq.q4: What exactly do I get with my website?
faq.a4: Alongside a responsive, fully functional website, you get a free graphics package for social media plus hands-on support during launch.
faq.q5: Do you help after the project is finished?
faq.a5: Yes — I stay with you through launch (domain/hosting setup) and remain available if questions come up afterward.
faq.a6: Just fill out the contact form or send a message — I'll get back to you within 24 hours to discuss the details.

cta.title: Ready for a brand that actually sells?
cta.text: Get in touch and let's talk about your project.

hero.title: I design brands and websites I'd believe in myself.
hero.text: MXM Design is a branding and web design studio based in Poland. I combine aesthetics with function so your brand doesn't just look good — it actually works.

story.title: My Story
story.text: It all started with a belief that good design is more than nice colors — it's clear communication, a consistent brand, and a website that actually supports sales. Today I help brands build that consistency from the ground up: from the logo, through visual identity, to a fully working website.

values.title: The Values I Work By
values.value1Text: No copy-paste solutions — every project reflects who your brand really is.
values.value2Text: Designed from scratch, with every detail tailored to your goals and audience.
values.value3Text: Carefully built websites — fast and responsive on every device.
values.value4Text: Design isn't decoration — it's a tool that actively supports your business.
values.value5Text: You always know exactly where your project stands and what happens next.
values.value6Text: I don't disappear after delivery — I help with launch and stay available after.
values.value7Text: Every website comes with a free graphics package included in the price.

process.title: How We'll Work Together
process.step1Text: We discuss your goals, brand, and expectations.
process.step2Text: I prepare a quote, then the design concept for your approval.
process.step3Text: I code and build the final version of the site.
process.step4Text: I launch the site and stay available if questions come up.

hero.title: Branding, websites, and ads — all under one roof.
hero.text: Three services, one consistent goal: a brand that looks professional and actually sells.
